overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through a medieval fantasy town at night. The journey progresses from open cobblestone streets through a plaza with a fountain, across a torch-lit bridge, and into dark underground tunnels.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval upper town street with timber-framed houses

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding Roach at a steady trot through cobblestone streets, approaching a town plaza

entered.detail: Half-timbered medieval house with dark wooden beams and plaster walls
Tall stone retaining wall with moss and weathering
Large metal fire basket burning with orange flames
Wet cobblestone road surface reflecting torchlight

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow medieval street at night, with Geralt riding through cobblestone lanes lined by timber-framed houses. Burning braziers provide warm orange light against the cool blue night sky as the camera approaches a town plaza.

events.description: exits narrow street into open plaza with stone fountain

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding around the central fountain in the town square

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing near the fountain holding a torch

entered.detail: Circular tiered stone fountain with water basin

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide town square featuring a prominent stone fountain at its center. Guards in armor stand near the fountain as Geralt rides around it, transitioning from the enclosed street to the open plaza before exiting toward a bridge.

events.description: approaches and crosses stone bridge lined with burning braziers
approaches large stone tunnel archway entrance

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding across the bridge and approaching a tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: guard holding a torch standing by the tunnel entrance

entered.detail: Low stone wall with coping stones along bridge edge
Series of large fire braziers burning along both sides of the bridge
Large Gothic stone archway marking tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: Geralt rides across a stone bridge illuminated by burning braziers on both sides. The bridge offers a view of water below before approaching a massive stone archway that marks the entrance to a covered tunnel passage.

events.description: enters tunnel where torchlight becomes primary illumination

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding through the covered tunnel passage

entered.detail: Dark brick walls with arched ceiling construction
Wall-mounted iron torch holder with burning flame
Abandoned wooden wheeled cart against the wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered brick tunnel where torch sconces provide the only light. The enclosed space features cobblestone flooring and abandoned wooden carts as Geralt rides deeper into the passage.

events.description: tunnel becomes darker with wooden scaffolding and construction materials visible

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding through the darker tunnel section with construction debris

entered.detail: Rough wooden construction scaffolding and platforms
Piles of wooden planks and building materials

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through a darker section of tunnel featuring wooden scaffolding and construction debris. The lighting becomes dimmer as the passage stretches deeper underground, with distant light visible at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval town at night, transitioning from open, torch-lit streets into the oppressive darkness of underground tunnels. It begins in narrow cobblestone lanes lined with timber-framed houses, where warm orange braziers contrast with the cool blue night sky. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed street opens into a wide town square featuring a central stone fountain and armored guards before shifting toward a bridge illuminated by burning braziers. The scene then passes through a massive stone archway, moving from the open air into a covered brick tunnel filled with abandoned wooden carts and torch-lit sconces. Finally, the passage narrows further into a dim underground section characterized by wooden scaffolding and construction debris, stretching deeper into the dark toward a distant light.
